examples: And, of course, it bounds this disc, but inside of a torus.
So we take water from the torus and insert it back over the core.
But you can also create a torus or sphere by extruding along a circular path.
Whether the simplified shape is a sphere or a torus is determined by the behaviour of one-dimensional curves on its surface.
In this example, the surface is not simply connected and any smoothed-out object looks like a torus with at least one hole.
